emails.subject: Re: 1/2 Day Vacation
emails.body: Re: 1/2 Day Vacation Ava, no problem. Just remind me on Friday. Thanks. Lynn From: Ava Garcia 06/13/2001 09:02 AM

emails.subject: 1/2 Day Vacation
emails.body: 1/2 Day Vacation Lynn, would it be okay if I took 1/2 day vacation on Monday, December 31st. Thanks, Ava

emails.subject: RE: 1/2 Day Vacation
emails.body: RE: 1/2 Day Vacation Ava, that will be fine. Let's be sure we get the SGA squared away today. I have a doctor's appointment this morning. I will be back by 10:30. Thanks. Lynn To: Blair, Lynn
